Bash(python3 -c "
content = open\('/Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/src/renderer/src/App.tsx'\).read\(\)
old = \\"\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'dashboard' && <DashboardPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'customers' && <CustomersPage />}\\"
new = \\"\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'dashboard'  && <DashboardPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'customers'  && <CustomersPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'categories' && <CategoriesPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'products'   && <ProductsPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'stock'      && <StockPage />}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{page === 'transfers'  && <TransfersPage />}\\"
if old in content:
    open\('/Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/src/renderer/src/App.tsx','w'\).write\(content.replace\(old, new, 1\)\)
    print\('REPLACED'\)
else:
    print\('NOT FOUND'\)
")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "
SELECT va.name as attr_name, vo.value as opt_value, vo.id as opt_id, va.id as attr_id
FROM variant_attributes va
JOIN variant_options vo ON vo.attribute_id = va.id
ORDER BY va.name, vo.sort_order;
")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "
SELECT pv.sku, pv.id as variant_id, GROUP_CONCAT\(pvo.option_id\) as option_ids
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN product_variant_options pvo ON pvo.variant_id = pv.id
GROUP BY pv.id
ORDER BY pv.sku;
")
